Module com.example.progettosw
Package Network.Server.RMI

Class RmiServer

java.lang.Object
Network.Server.RMI.RmiServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Remote, VirtualServer
public class RmiServer extends Object implements VirtualServer

      Parameters:

      This method is used to add a card to a station

      Parameters:

      id - the id of the card
      playedBack - the boolean value of the card
      x - the x coordinate of the card
      y - the y coordinate of the card

      RemoteException - if a remote error occurs
